description: Create two Splunk workflow actions and one saved search to accelerate incident response using the Splunk web interface (http://localhost:8000) with credentials admin / SplunkAdmin1!. Create a URL-type workflow action named exactly 'AbuseIPDB_Check' with the label 'Check IP on AbuseIPDB' that opens 'https://www.abuseipdb.com/check/$src_ip$' in a new window, applied to events where sourcetype is 'linux_secure'. Create a search-type workflow action named exactly 'Deep_IP_Investigation' with the label 'Investigate this IP across all indexes' that executes a search across multiple indexes (including 'index=*' or referencing at least two indexes) using an IP field token in a new search window. Create a saved search named exactly 'Top_Attacking_IPs' that queries the 'security_logs' index to aggregate failed authentication attempts by source IP, sorted by count descending.
